name: Lollipop Cookies
recipeInstructions: Use a sugar or peanut butter cookie mix, yielding about 3 dozen cookies. Prepare the cookie dough and baking sheet according to package directions or make your own dough using a recipe that results in a stiff dough without excessive shortening. With too much shortening, the cookies may crumble easily. Form the dough into 1 1/2-inch balls and place them about 2 inches apart on the baking sheet. Insert a wooden stick halfway into each ball of dough. Use the flat bottom of a glass to flatten the cookies slightly. Decorate as desired with raisins and bits of snipped dried fruit. Bake at the specified time and temperature for the mix. Remove to a wire rack to cool completely.
